title: Top Modules Bought
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ModuleBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(BuyItem_Localised, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ModuleBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY BuyItem_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
